GenAiFunction.description:
Send an in-app custom notification to one or more Salesforce users. Primarily used as the FINAL step of a PlanForLater headless run to deliver the result, or when the user explicitly asks to notify someone.
Use when: - Completing a scheduled plan (PlanForLater) or background task (RunMyOrgButler) — always the last step. - The user explicitly says "notify", "ping", "send me a notification", "let [user] know".
NOT for: - The primary response in a live conversation — just reply in the chat. - Sending email, Slack, or SMS — this action only produces in-app custom notifications.
Inputs and constraints: - recipientIds: comma-separated String of User Ids (NOT a List). If omitted, the current user is notified. Look up Ids via QueryRecordsWithSoql first. - title: plain text, max 250 chars. - body: plain text, max 750 chars. NO markdown, NO HTML, NO inline links. Numbered lists with record names are fine, but never use link syntax. - targetId: a single record Id — the notification as a whole becomes clickable and opens that record.
If the user asks for something that can't fit (multiple links, long reports, formatting), explain the constraint before calling.
